parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ model: 'claude-haiku-4-5', max_tokens: 1024, system: $('Build Prompt').first().json.system_prompt, messages: [{ role: 'user', content: 'Incident: agent=' + $('Build Prompt').first().json.agent_name + ' event=' + $('Build Prompt').first().json.event_type + ' severity=' + $('Build Prompt').first().json.severity + ' payload=' + JSON.stringify($('Build Prompt').first().json.trigger_payload || {}) }] }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ dispatch_id: $json.dispatch_id, agent_name: $json.agent_name, trigger_source: 'event', trigger_context: $json.extra_context || {}, diagnosis: $json.diagnosis, proposed_fix: $json.proposed_fix, confidence: $json.confidence, tokens_used: $json.tokens_used, cost_usd: $json.cost_usd, model_version: 'claude-haiku-4-5', status: 'pending' }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ status: 'done', completed_at: new Date().toISOString(), cost_usd: $('Parse + Cost').first().json.cost_usd, diagnosis: $('Parse + Cost').first().json.diagnosis, proposed_fix: $('Parse + Cost').first().json.proposed_fix }) }}

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ ok: true, dispatch_id: $('Parse + Cost').first().json.dispatch_id, diagnosis_inserted: true, cost_usd: $('Parse + Cost').first().json.cost_usd }) }}
={{ JSON.stringify({ ok: true, skipped: true, reason: 'already_processed_or_circuit_broken' }) }}
